allow: Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "\\d departments")

Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) total FROM departments; SELECT COUNT\(*\) total FROM locations; SELECT COUNT\(*\) total FROM suppliers; SELECT COUNT\(*\) total FROM asset_types;")
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "SELECT code, name FROM departments ORDER BY name;")
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "\\d assets")
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c ":*)
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "\\d suppliers")
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "\\d locations")
Bash(docker exec asset_db psql -U asset_user -d asset_management -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users;")
